title: Crispy Italian Chickpea Fritters
description: A crunchy Italian-inspired snack made with chickpeas and a hint of French flair. Perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. Drain and rinse the chickpeas, and mash them in a large bowl using a fork or a potato masher.
2. Add the savory, crunch, and French to the bowl, and mix well.
3. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
4. Using your hands, shape the chickpea mixture into patties.
5. Dip each patty in the breading, coating both sides evenly.
6. Place the breaded patties in the skillet, and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove the fritters from the skillet, and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve the crispy Italian chickpea fritters hot, garnished with chopped parsley or basil if desired.
